ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1601. Also member of the Accademia degli Affidati in Pavia, Insensati in Perugia, and Informi in Ravenna, where he delivered a lecture in defense of women, starting from a sonnet by Bernardo Tasso.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
